description: Final build verification, fix any TypeScript or compilation errors, ensure no hardcoded localhost references, confirm all routes pass build, and commit changes.
steps: Run npm run build. If there are TypeScript errors, fix them. Common issues to watch for: import path mismatches, missing type declarations for lightweight-charts, unused variables, incorrect module exports.

Search the entire codebase for hardcoded localhost references (localhost:3000, localhost:3001, 127.0.0.1:3000, 127.0.0.1:3001) and remove/replace with relative paths or environment-safe origin logic (window.location.origin).
Verify the build output shows all required routes compiled: /, /auth, /chart-kitchen, /dashboard, /journal, /missions, /roadmap.
Run git add on all new and modified files, then git commit with message 'Finalize TCU Market Kitchen Terminal'. Do NOT push.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes with zero errors
No hardcoded localhost port references in any production code
All 7 required routes appear in build output
Git commit is created with message 'Finalize TCU Market Kitchen Terminal'
verification: Run npm run build and confirm exit code 0 with all routes listed
Run grep -r 'localhost:300' in project and confirm no matches in app/lib/components code
findings: Build passed with zero errors. No hardcoded localhost references found in the codebase. All 7 required routes (/, /auth, /chart-kitchen, /dashboard, /journal, /missions, /roadmap) confirmed in build output. Commit created successfully.
